name: Designer Smiles Santa Rosa
tagline: Personalized dentistry for a smile that feels like you
seoDescription: Designer Smiles Santa Rosa is the dental practice of Dr. Ankita Kakar at 6543 Montecito Blvd — cosmetic, restorative, and preventive care with modern digital technology, rated 5.0 stars.

images.heroAlt: A patient's bright, healthy smile at Designer Smiles Santa Rosa

sections.eyebrow: Santa Rosa, CA · Cosmetic & Family Dentistry
sections.heading: A smile designed around you
sections.subheading: Led by Dr. Ankita Kakar, Designer Smiles blends advanced digital dentistry with kind, unhurried care at 6543 Montecito Blvd.

image.alt: A patient's bright, healthy smile at Designer Smiles Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Dentistry that respects the health and the beauty of your smile
body: At Designer Smiles, we believe your smile is a reflection of who you are — not just clean teeth or straight lines, but the confidence to speak clearly and share your expression freely. Every visit is designed to be welcoming, supportive, and centered on your long-term wellness.

The practice is led by Dr. Ankita Kakar, who earned her DDS at the University of the Pacific in San Francisco and completed advanced training in oral implantology at the UCLA School of Dentistry. She brings more than a decade of experience and a philosophy of treating every patient with kindness, empathy, and integrity.
highlights: Led by Dr. Ankita Kakar, DDS · MDS
Advanced implant training at UCLA School of Dentistry
Rated 5.0 stars by Santa Rosa patients

image.alt: Dr. Kakar's team caring for a smiling patient at Designer Smiles

sections.heading: Care for every part of your smile
sections.intro: From a routine cleaning to a full smile redesign, here's how we can help.

items.title: Personalized Smile Design
items.description: A tailored plan that considers the health and the look of your whole smile — not a one-size-fits-all template.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Veneers, cosmetic bonding, and teeth whitening to address stains, chips, and uneven color.

items.title: Invisalign Clear Aligners
items.description: Discreet, removable aligners that straighten crowded or misaligned teeth without metal braces.

items.title: Digital Imaging & Scanning
items.description: Intraoral camera, digital X-rays, and iTero scans for precise, low-radiation diagnostics.

items.title: Preventive Care
items.description: Regular exams and cleanings to keep your teeth and gums healthy for the long term.

items.title: Restorative & Implant Care
items.description: Periodontal treatment, implant restoration, and same-day CEREC crowns to rebuild and protect your smile.

sections.heading: Ready for a smile that feels like you?
sections.body: Visit us at 6543 Montecito Blvd in Santa Rosa, or call (707) 539-2176 to book a visit.

sections.heading: Comprehensive, modern dental care
sections.subheading: Cosmetic, restorative, and preventive dentistry under one roof — built around a digital workflow for precision and comfort.

items.title: A plan built for you
items.body: Dr. Kakar walks you through realistic options — no one-size-fits-all, no pressure.

items.title: Care, your way
items.body: We do the work gently and keep you comfortable and informed the whole way through.

items.a: We're at 6543 Montecito Blvd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409.
Monday, Tuesday and Thursday 9am–5pm; Wednesday and Friday 9am–2pm; closed weekends.

items.q: Do you offer cosmetic treatments like veneers and whitening?
items.a: Yes. Designer Smiles offers personalized smile design, veneers, cosmetic bonding, teeth whitening, and Invisalign clear aligners.

items.q: How do I book a visit?
items.a: Call (707) 539-2176 and our team will be glad to get you scheduled.

sections.heading: Let's design your smile
sections.body: Call (707) 539-2176 or stop by 6543 Montecito Blvd in Santa Rosa.

sections.heading: Kind, modern dentistry in Santa Rosa
sections.subheading: Led by Dr. Ankita Kakar — a University of the Pacific–trained dentist with advanced implant training from UCLA.

sections.heading: Dentistry built on kindness, empathy, and integrity
body: At Designer Smiles, we believe your smile is a reflection of who you are — not just clean teeth or straight lines, but the confidence to speak clearly and share your expression freely. Every visit is designed to be welcoming, supportive, and centered on your long-term wellness.

The practice is led by Dr. Ankita Kakar, who earned her DDS at the University of the Pacific in San Francisco and completed advanced training in oral implantology at the UCLA School of Dentistry. Originally from New Delhi, she brings more than a decade of experience and a philosophy of treating every patient with kindness, empathy, and integrity.

Alongside her, dental assistant Sandra brings over two decades of clinical experience and is, in Dr. Kakar's words, the backbone of the practice — there to understand what each patient needs and make every appointment comfortable.
highlights: Dr. Ankita Kakar, DDS · MDS — University of the Pacific
Advanced oral implantology training at UCLA
Sandra, lead dental assistant — 20+ years of experience
